results.description:
History Daily - Your Gateway to the Past

Transform your daily routine into a journey through time with History Daily, the beautifully simple app that brings historical events right to your fingertips.

Key Features:
Daily Historical Facts - Discover 2-3 fascinating events that happened on this day throughout history
Home Screen Widget - Access today's history facts instantly without opening the app
Seasonal Themes - Enjoy beautiful themes that change with the seasons and special holidays
Clean, Simple Design - No clutter, no complexity - just pure historical discovery
Completely Free - All features available at no cost

Whether you're a lifelong history buff or just curious about the past, History Daily makes learning about historical events effortless and engaging. Start each day with a fascinating glimpse into what happened on this day in history.

Download History Daily today and make history part of your daily routine!

results.releaseNotes:
- New themes and tons of new facts!
- Other fixes and improvements.

Love the app? Tell us in the reviews section! We read it all. Have a happy day!
results.description:
Knowledge is power. Learn interesting things every day and surprise everyone with Daily Random Facts!

Want everyone to think you’re super smart? Amaze others with your unique knowledge of facts and stand out from the crowd. Or just try to learn something new every day. You’ll have loads of fun with Daily Random Facts so try it out today for free!

Explore thousands of facts and interesting content, sorted in categories like:


- Human body facts
- History dates
- Facts about animals
- Life hacks
- Facts for kids
- Facts about sports
- Trivia questions and answers
- Science facts
- Riddles
- And many more!

And now with Facts Premium you can:


+ Remove ads
+ Save your favorite facts
+ Change font and colors
+ Search facts by word
+ Browse facts curated in categories

To get access to the Facts Premium content and functionality, you can choose between a lifetime, monthly, and yearly auto-renewable subscription. This is a recurring transaction that will be charged to your iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase and will automatically renew unless you cancel it at least 24 hours before the end of your subscription. Renewals will be charged at the same cost within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage your subscriptions and auto-renewal can be turned off by going to your iTunes Account Settings after purchase.

Privacy Policy: https://monkeytaps.net/privacy
Terms of Use: https://monkeytaps.net/terms

DailyArt is the #1 app to learn about art history. Every day, get inspired by beautiful classic, modern, and contemporary art masterpieces and read short stories about them. Join the community of art lovers for whom DailyArt is something that enlightens their day, every day. For free!

Do you want to know why van Gogh cut off his ear? Find out who "invented" abstraction? Learn more about women artists forgotten by art history? Open DailyArt and find out! 

Download the app to:
- Every day, get one piece of fine art with a short story about it, 
- Explore the collection of more than 4000 masterpieces,
- Read 1200 artist biographies and information about 600 museum collections,
- Explore carefully curated Collections and artsy City Guides,
- Browse everything with our advanced search engine,
- Use it in 23 languages!
- Join DailyArt Patron, a club for art history enthusiasts.

Furthermore:
- Add masterpieces to your favorites,
- Share everything with your family and friends,
- Subscribe to receive everyday features as push notifications,
- Use beautiful widgets,
- If your language is not supported, use the translate button to read everything in it."
- Set up your account and use DailyArt on multiple devices your phones, tablets, iWatches,
- Use in either dark or light mode,
- And what's most important: enjoy art!

Learn something new about art every day—you just need two minutes of your time. Get your daily dose of beauty and inspiration for free.

Loved by the users and praised by the App Store and international media, DailyArt is a must-have for all art lovers!

-----------------------------------
If you love DailyArt, get DailyArt Premium! Learn about art history with no ads and get full access to the entire content.

You can find our Privacy Policy here: https://www.getdailyart.com/privacypolicy and Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.getdailyart.com/terms

Chronological events which happened on this day in history. These events come from various sources in various languages which you can select. 
You can browse all events of today using the arrows buttons. 
If you are interested in further information regarding a particular event, simply tap on the text and you get related links for that event.
There are many sources for events from all over the world in many different languages. Choose all you are interested in.

results.releaseNotes: We’ve fixed a few minor bugs and introduced versioned updates for selected articles.
results.description:
Nerdish is a self-education app for adults who aim to learn and know more about the world. Read concise and engaging articles with insights on topics related to science, history, arts, society, technology, famous people, food, daily things and other fields of general knowledge. Nerdish helps you learn something new every day with quick 5–10 minute reads.

Nerdish offers:
- Short, science-based, and inspiring learning articles across categories like Art and Culture, History, Science, Technology, Psychology, Health, Politics, and Society.
- All content is designed for self-education on the go — brief, fact-checked, well-structured, and perfect for curious minds who love learning.
- Get maximum knowledge in minimum time with quick daily reads that make education simple, engaging, and fun.

The articles featured in Nerdish are short, science-based, and easy to read — yet far from being just collections of random facts.
Each topic delivers essential knowledge in a clear, structured way, helping you learn the basics of science, history, art, and more in just minutes.
Key ideas across different articles are logically connected, creating a deeper understanding of the world and helping knowledge stick.
Nerdish makes self-education simple and inspiring — combining learning, discovery, and personal growth in every read.

Nerdish is a perfect match for those who:
- Love learning and discovering new facts every day.
- Enjoy reading short, engaging, and educational articles.
- Are curious about the world and excited to expand their general knowledge.
- Love nonfiction books and smart, inspiring reads.
- Enjoy finding new ideas and connections between things they already know.

Nerdish is a new way to approach lifelong learning and self-development.
The world around us is constantly changing, and expanding your knowledge helps you stay inspired, think creatively, and adapt with ease. At work, on a date, or at a party — it always feels good to be the one who knows a bit more. With Nerdish, you can keep learning every day and become that curious, confident, and well-informed person everyone loves to talk to.

Learn with us about: 
- History and civilization: ancient empires, great discoveries, revolutions, and remarkable people who changed the world.
- Science and nature: the human body, space, evolution, physics, and everyday phenomena explained simply.
- Art and culture: painting, music, architecture, design, literature, and creative movements.
- Psychology and society: emotions, thinking, habits, communication, and social change.
- Technology and innovation: AI, inventions, space exploration, and the tools that shape modern life.
- Daily life and fun facts: why the sky is blue, how coffee was discovered, or where common ideas come from.

Nerdish is making popular science more popular.

Today in History is free app about history and it's very simple end easy to use. App shows the most important historical events in the World.  
There is a lot of educational, informative, political facts.
Most of the events have button read more which link you to full article of the event. Full articles come from  Wikipedia, 
Currently there are more than 137.000 events. Events are divided in three sets:
- Events (17.500+)
- Births (84.500+)
- Deaths (35.000+)

It support many different languages

Description: 
This app provides random historical facts from the very inception of humanity to the modern day. Each fact is overlaid over a beautiful color gradient. Swipe to gain a new fact. Each time a fact is generated, a new color gradient is produced. Choose between three custom backgrounds depending on your mood and potentially to fit the theme of the fact. Sometimes, a fact will be accompanied by a "Learn More" button at the bottom of the screen. Click on this button to get linked to a Wikipedia article with more information on that fact. This can be especially useful if this is part of a time period or part of the world that you are not familiar with. 

Use cases: 
This app is for everyone to use at any point during the day. If you are at a dinner party, waiting for the bus, or just looking for an education app to scroll through in the morning. The Historical Facts app will be there to generate an interesting event sometime in the past. You will be sure to learn something new each day. Prepare to have your curiosity piqued and your knowledge expanded. 

Feedback: 
Please provide feedback to solvusindustries@gmail.com. Also, please leave us a 5 star review!

results.releaseNotes:
Today in History, now even easier to keep close. This update brings a refreshed look, a bigger widget option, and a few reliability improvements behind the scenes.
- Updated app icon to better reflect the app
- Added a large home screen widget alongside the small one
- Fixed issues with widget updates
- Fixed notification triggering issues
results.description:
Explore history with the Factorium app every day. Get daily educational, curated articles with cool and really interesting facts about historical events which happened today in history — art, scientific discoveries, groundbreaking inventions, famous people’s birthdays, cultural milestones, political turning points, and more. Learn about the history that shaped the world, expand your general knowledge, and build a healthy habit of learning something new every day.

Every article in Factorium is carefully selected and written to give you more knowledge in less time. Each story is short, well-researched, and designed to be read in just a few minutes. It’s not just a list of random events or facts — it’s a structured learning experience to help you explore the history that matters.

Add the Factorium history widget and see today’s historical event at a glance — no need to open the app. History just becomes part of your daily routine.

Download Factorium and make history exploration easy and truly enjoyable.

Terms of Use (EULA) https://factorium.io/terms-of-use/

Learn from the past. Grow every day.

Daily Bios transforms history into your personal mentor. Each day, you’ll receive 3 powerful, bite-sized biographies drawn from our library of over 1,300+ legendary lives — leaders, inventors, artists, philosophers, rebels, and visionaries. Every bio is designed to be read in minutes yet leave a lasting impact.

Whether you want to master power, enhance creativity, improve communication, build resilience, or simply grow smarter each day, Daily Bios makes history unforgettable — and actionable.

Why Daily Bios?
	•	3 New Biographies Daily – With the Starter Plan, you’ll get a steady stream of fresh inspiration every day.
	•	Massive Library – Upgrade to Pro and unlock 1,300+ biographies across eras, from ancient emperors to modern innovators.
	•	Personalized Learning – Choose your goals: power, resilience, seduction, creativity, leadership, or just learning.
	•	Audio Narration – Every biography comes with audio playback, so you can learn on the go.
	•	Quizzes & Fun Facts – Challenge yourself with quick quizzes, myths, and surprising details you didn’t know.
	•	Save & Collect – Pro lets you bookmark your favorite biographies and build your own personal library of wisdom.
	•	Practical Lessons – Each bio ends with a specific, real-world lesson you can apply today.

Plans & Pricing
	•	Starter Plan: Access 3 new biographies every day.
	•	Pro Plan: Begin with a 3-day free trial, then unlock the entire 1,300+ biography library, plus audio, quizzes, and save features.

Cancel anytime through your Apple ID settings.

Perfect For:
	•	Students who want quick, powerful learning outside of textbooks
	•	Professionals seeking daily motivation and leadership insights
	•	History lovers craving new stories and hidden details
	•	Anyone who wants to improve themselves while learning fascinating stories

Join the Movement

Daily Bios isn’t just about remembering the past — it’s about using it to build your future. Start today and unlock the wisdom of history’s greatest minds, rebels, and creators.
